description: Configure the cellar Chrome workstation according to the Beverage Team Browser Standard. Import bookmarks from ~/Desktop/cellar_bookmarks.html and organize them into four folders on the bookmark bar: 'Old World Appellations' (INAO, Federdoc, Rioja, Bourgogne, Bordeaux, Chianti), 'New World Regions' (TTB, Wine Australia, WOSA, NZ Wine, Wines of Argentina), 'Distributors & Allocations' (Skurnik, Kermit Lynch, Rosenthal, Winebow, Southern Glazers, SevenFifty), and 'Education & Reference' (GuildSomm, Wine-Searcher, Jancis Robinson, Decanter, Wine Folly). Remove any personal or junk bookmarks including ESPN, Netflix, Facebook, and X/Twitter. Create ~/Documents/Tech_Sheets and set it as the default download directory with the 'ask where to save' prompt enabled. Configure the Medium font size to 18, the Minimum font size to 14, and enable the 'Offer to translate pages' setting. Enable the '#smooth-scrolling' and '#enable-parallel-downloading' flags. Add custom search engines with keyword 'ws' for 'https://www.wine-searcher.com/find?s=%s' and 'gs' for 'https://www.guildsomm.com/search?q=%s'. Set the browser to open sevenfifty.com and binwise.com on startup.
